name: security-blue-red-team
description: Product-agnostic Vulnerability Assessment / Red Team / Blue Team security testing automation for Claude Code. v0.3.0 splits monthly SAST + passive into security-vulnerability-assessment (Layer 1+2), while security-red-team focuses on active attack simulation (Layer 3+4 default). Adds Layer 3 cleanup-queue + /security-cleanup, per-host rate limiting (100 req/host, 1 req/sec sustained), and Purple Team chaining (/security-redteam --purple).
